commands.review_summary:
The PR normalizes inline provider configs through provider policy before building inline model entries and adds Anthropic inline-model regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main builds inline models from raw provider api while the resolver requires inlineMatch.api, and Anthropic policy supplies the missing default only when invoked. I did not run tests because this review was constrained to read-only inspection.
commands.review_followup: Not a repair job: the branch already contains the narrow code/test fix, and the next action is contributor real-behavior proof plus normal maintainer review.

target.title: fix(models): apply provider-level api default in buildInlineProviderModels
target.body:
## Summary

- Updates `buildInlineProviderModels` to normalize each inline provider config through the current provider policy path before building inline model entries.
- Uses the existing bundled provider policy surface (`normalizeProviderConfigForConfigDefaults` -> `provider-policy-api.normalizeConfig` -> `extensions/anthropic/config-defaults.ts`) instead of the removed stale `resolveDefaultProviderApi` helper.
- Keeps the fix scoped to model resolution; no Telegram/network retry files are touched.

## Behavior proof

Added a builder-level regression test showing the exact missing default:

```text
buildInlineProviderModels > applies Anthropic provider policy api defaults to inline models
```

This test failed before the fix with:

```text
AssertionError: expected undefined to be 'anthropic-messages'
```

Added an end-to-end resolver test:

```text
resolveModel > resolves Anthropic inline entries that rely on provider policy api defaults
```

That test resolves an inline `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6` entry whose provider config has no explicit `api`, and verifies the resolved model includes:

```text
provider: "anthropic"
id: "claude-sonnet-4-6"
api: "anthropic-messages"
```

The same builder test also verifies a non-Anthropic inline provider without explicit `api` remains `undefined`.

## Verification

```text
pnpm test src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.inline-provider.test.ts src/config/model-alias-defaults.test.ts extensions/anthropic/provider-policy-api.test.ts

✓ model.inline-provider.test.ts (12 tests)
✓ model-alias-defaults.test.ts (13 tests)
✓ provider-policy-api.test.ts (7 tests)
[test] passed 3 Vitest shards in 6.41s
```

```text
pnpm test src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.test.ts

✓ model.test.ts (77 tests)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 8.36s
```
